action_item_history_transition_check.name: action_item_history_transition_check
action_item_history_transition_check.value:
(
        (
          `action_item_history`.`decision` = 'approve'
          and `action_item_history`.`previous_status` in ('open', 'deferred')
          and `action_item_history`.`new_status` = 'approved'
        )
        or
        (
          `action_item_history`.`decision` = 'reject'
          and `action_item_history`.`previous_status` in ('open', 'deferred')
          and `action_item_history`.`new_status` = 'rejected'
        )
        or
        (
          `action_item_history`.`decision` = 'defer'
          and `action_item_history`.`previous_status` = 'open'
          and `action_item_history`.`new_status` = 'deferred'
        )
      )

action_items_source_fields_check.name: action_items_source_fields_check
action_items_source_fields_check.value:
(
        (`action_items`.`source_type` is null and `action_items`.`source_id` is null and `action_items`.`source_label` is null)
        or
        (`action_items`.`source_type` is not null and `action_items`.`source_id` is not null and `action_items`.`source_label` is not null)
      )

content_pages_normalized_path_check.name: content_pages_normalized_path_check
content_pages_normalized_path_check.value:
(
        trim(`content_pages`.`normalized_path`) = `content_pages`.`normalized_path`
        and `content_pages`.`normalized_path` <> ''
        and left(`content_pages`.`normalized_path`, 1) = '/'
        and `content_pages`.`normalized_path` not like '%?%'
        and `content_pages`.`normalized_path` not like '%#%'
      )

content_pages_published_at_check.name: content_pages_published_at_check
content_pages_published_at_check.value:
(
        (`content_pages`.`status` = 'draft' and `content_pages`.`published_at` is null)
        or
        (`content_pages`.`status` = 'published' and `content_pages`.`published_at` is not null)
      )

creator_links_availability_check.name: creator_links_availability_check
creator_links_availability_check.value:
(
        (
          `creator_links`.`availability` = 'available'
          and `creator_links`.`href` is not null
          and trim(`creator_links`.`href`) <> ''
        )
        or
        (
          `creator_links`.`availability` = 'unavailable'
          and `creator_links`.`availability_note` is not null
          and trim(`creator_links`.`availability_note`) <> ''
        )
      )

event_approval_queue_review_state_check.name: event_approval_queue_review_state_check
event_approval_queue_review_state_check.value:
(
        (
          `event_approval_queue`.`status` = 'pending'
          and `event_approval_queue`.`reviewer_user_id` is null
          and `event_approval_queue`.`reviewed_at` is null
          and `event_approval_queue`.`review_note` is null
        )
        or
        (
          `event_approval_queue`.`status` <> 'pending'
          and `event_approval_queue`.`reviewed_at` is not null
        )
      )

event_history_destination_outcome_check.name: event_history_destination_outcome_check
event_history_destination_outcome_check.value:
(
        (
          `event_history`.`routing_outcome` in ('ignored', 'blocked_opt_out', 'blocked_cooldown', 'blocked_safety', 'failed')
          and `event_history`.`destination` is null
        )
        or
        (
          `event_history`.`routing_outcome` in ('stored_internal', 'routed', 'queued_for_approval')
          and `event_history`.`destination` is not null
        )
      )

event_history_simulated_money_check.name: event_history_simulated_money_check
event_history_simulated_money_check.value: not (`event_history`.`is_real_money` = true and (`event_history`.`is_test` = true or `event_history`.`is_simulated` = true))

event_history_test_reset_boundary_check.name: event_history_test_reset_boundary_check
event_history_test_reset_boundary_check.value:
(
        `event_history`.`test_resettable` = false
        or (
          (`event_history`.`is_test` = true or `event_history`.`is_simulated` = true)
          and `event_history`.`is_real_money` = false
        )
      )

stream_schedule_cancellation_check.name: stream_schedule_cancellation_check
stream_schedule_cancellation_check.value:
(
        (
          `stream_schedule_entries`.`status` = 'cancelled'
          and `stream_schedule_entries`.`cancellation_reason_code` is not null
          and `stream_schedule_entries`.`cancellation_reason` is not null
          and trim(`stream_schedule_entries`.`cancellation_reason`) <> ''
        )
        or
        (
          `stream_schedule_entries`.`status` <> 'cancelled'
          and `stream_schedule_entries`.`cancellation_reason_code` is null
          and `stream_schedule_entries`.`cancellation_reason` is null
        )
      )
